name: New Job
blurb: You land a new job. Direct deposit, who is she.

name: Unexpected Inheritance
blurb: A distant relative leaves you an inheritance you did not see coming.

name: Randomly Meet Cutie
blurb: You randomly meet someone cute out in the world.

name: Viral Moment
blurb: Something you posted blows up, in a good way.

name: Old Flame Resurfaces
blurb: An old flame texts you out of nowhere.

name: Surprise Windfall
blurb: A surprise windfall lands in your account.

name: Great Apartment Opens Up
blurb: A great apartment opens up right when you need it.

name: Car Trouble
blurb: Your car breaks down at the worst possible time.

name: Fired From Job
blurb: You get fired. It was not a good week for it.

name: Mom Dies
blurb: Your mom dies. There isn't really a lesson in this one.

name: Family Finds Out (Badly)
blurb: Your family finds out about the arrangement, and it does not go well.

name: Compersion Hits Different
blurb: You catch a glimpse of {target}'s other relationship going well, and it genuinely makes you happy.

name: Munch Gossip
blurb: Someone at the munch is talking about your polycule, and not quietly.

name: Insurance/Legal Snag
blurb: An insurance form reminds you, again, that the law only recognizes one relationship at a time.

name: Grant Money Comes Through
blurb: The grant application from three months ago actually comes through.

name: Piece Gets Featured
blurb: Someone's photos of your piece start circulating and people are into it.

name: Generator Dies Two Days Before Load-In
blurb: The generator dies two days before load-in.

name: Rival Crew Steals Your Concept
blurb: A rival crew debuts a piece suspiciously close to your concept.

name: A Legend In The Scene DMs You
blurb: A legend in the scene slides into your DMs about your work.
